products.name: SOSA™ aligned power supply
products.descriptor: Rugged 3U OpenVPX COTs power supply aligned to SOSA standard

evidence.snippet:
SOSA™ aligned power supply
==========================
The Vicor SOSA-aligned power supply is a COTs power supply that is designed for 3U Open VPX systems that are developed to the SOSA standard. The module utilizes Vicor proprietary technology to enable high efficiency and power density for this highly rugged, conduction-cooled model.

![Military standard compliance to MIL‑STD 704F, 461G, 810G, 1275E](/files/live/sites/vicor/files/images/icons/on-white/icon-defense-aero-on-white.svg)
Military standard compliance to MIL‑STD 704F, 461G, 810G, 1275E

products.name: VITA 62 power supply
products.descriptor: MIL-COTS 3U/6U OpenVPX power supply, 28V or 270VDC input, up to 1000W

evidence.snippet:
VITA 62 power supply
====================
MIL-COTS power supplies that are designed for 3U and 6U OpenVPX systems
